case_title: AVOCA TRUCKING & EXCAVATING, INC. VS LEWIS, STEVEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY AVOCA TRUCKING & EXCAVATING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, STEVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, STEVEN
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-29-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-26-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 4/26/06 AT 10:00 A.M. FOR FURTHER HEARING AND FOR TRIAL IN RELATED ACTION 816630.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVOCA TRUCKING & EXCAVATING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, STEVEN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00, UPON SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL ISSUE AND RECORD ITS RELEASE OF LIEN IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT AND HIS PROPERTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT SENT TO AVOCA TRUCKING & EXCAVATING, INC. RETURNED UNDELIVERED.
CONTINUANCE NOTICE FOR HEARING DATE OF APRIL 26, 2006 RETURNED TO COURT. P.O. BOX CLOSED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, STEVEN
